attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
  TMP1.CONVERSION_DT     CONVERSION_DT                 ,
  TMP1.SALES_REP_NUMBER       SALES_REP_NUMBER              ,
  TMP1.TRANSACTION_DATETIME      TRANSACTION_DATETIME          ,
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY TMP1.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,TMP1.TRANSACTION_DATETIME ASC) + TMP2.MAX_VAL AS  TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT,
  TMP1.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE       SALES_CHANNEL_CODE            ,
  TMP1.CDB_DATA_SOURCE_CODE       CDB_DATA_SOURCE_CODE          ,
  TMP1.SPLIT_PERCENTAGE      SPLIT_PERCENTAGE              ,
  TMP1.DD_SERVICE_FLAG       DD_SERVICE_FLAG               ,
  TMP1.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY      SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  TMP1.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY       BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  ,        
  TMP1.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY      SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  TMP1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
  TMP1.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT    BK_SO_NUMBER_INT              ,
  TMP1.PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER     PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER         ,
  TMP1.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME      BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME        ,
  TMP1.FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE     FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE          ,
  TMP1.BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE     BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE           ,
  TMP1.NET_PRICE_AMOUNT      NET_PRICE_AMOUNT              ,
  TMP1.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY       TRANSACTION_QUANTITY          ,
  TMP1.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE    BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE          ,
  TMP1.SALES_ORDER_KEY     SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
  TMP1.DD_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG       DD_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG        ,
  TMP1.DD_RMA_FLAG      DD_RMA_FLAG                   ,
  TMP1.DD_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLAG       DD_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLAG    ,
  TMP1.DD_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLAG       DD_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLAG      ,
  TMP1.DD_REVENUE_FLAG      DD_REVENUE_FLAG               ,
  TMP1.DD_OVERLAY_FLAG      DD_OVERLAY_FLAG               ,
  TMP1.DD_SALESREP_FLAG      DD_SALESREP_FLAG              ,
  TMP1.DD_IC_REVENUE_FLAG       DD_IC_REVENUE_FLAG            ,
  TMP1.DD_CHARGES_FLAG       DD_CHARGES_FLAG               ,
  TMP1.DD_MISC_FLAG      DD_MISC_FLAG                  ,
  TMP1.DD_ACQUISITION_FLAG     DD_ACQUISITION_FLAG           ,
  TMP1.ES_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT      ES_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT            ,
  TMP1.CANCELLED_FLG       CANCELLED_FLG                 ,
  TMP1.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME      RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME      ,
  TMP1.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE       SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE     ,
  TMP1.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE      SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE            ,
  TMP1.SALES_ORDER_OPERATING_UNIT      SALES_ORDER_OPERATING_UNIT    ,
  TMP1.PRODUCT_KEY       PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
  TMP1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY      SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
  TMP1.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE      SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE        ,
  TMP1.CUSTOMER_PO_TYPE_CD       CUSTOMER_PO_TYPE_CD           ,
  TMP1.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE      SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE        ,
  TMP1.BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME      BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME             ,
  TMP1.PRICING_DATE      PRICING_DATE                  ,
  TMP1.LINE_CREATION_DATE       LINE_CREATION_DATE            ,
  TMP1.UNIT_LIST_PRICE       UNIT_LIST_PRICE               ,
  TMP1.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME     SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME         ,
  TMP1.EP_CHANGED_QUANTITY     EP_CHANGED_QUANTITY,
  TMP1.EDW_CREATE_USER       EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
  TMP1.EDW_UPDATE_USER     EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
  TMP1.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME     EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           ,
  TMP1.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME      EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           ,
  TMP1.ORDER_DTM        ORDER_DTM,
  TMP1.SO_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT SO_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,
  TMP1.SOL_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT SOL_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,
  TMP1.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,
  TMP1.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY   ,
  TMP1.EP_PROCESS_DT,
  TMP1.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
  TMP1.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT  ,   
  TMP1.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,   
  TMP1.DV_PRODUCT_KEY  ,
  TMP1.BK_SO_LINE_CANCEL_REASON_CD,
  TMP1.CANCEL_CODE,
  TMP1.ATTRIBUTION_PCT /*Added ATTRIBUTION_PCT as part of Q1FY15 -Offer Attribution for Base list price changes*/                  
  ,COALESCE(TMP1.POB_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') /* Added as part of NRS MPOB Changes */
  ,TMP1.SALES_MOTION_CD /*Added as part of Sales OCTFY18Rel Changes*/
  ,COALESCE(TMP1.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN')  /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
  ,TMP1.UNIT_WHLSL_PRC_LST_LOC_AMT  /*ADDED AS PART OF SFP Q4FY21 REL*/
  FROM
  (
  SELECT  
  CASE
  WHEN   NSOT.ORDER_DTM IS NULL 
  THEN CAST(NSOT.SO_SOURCE_CREATE_DTM AS DATE)
  ELSE       CAST(NSOT.ORDER_DTM AS DATE)
  END             CONVERSION_DT,
  COALESCE(NSFATNHT.SALES_REP_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') SALES_REP_NUMBER,
  NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_DATETIME TRANSACTION_DATETIME,
  COALESCE(NSONHT.SALES_CHANNEL_CD,'UNKNOWN') SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
  CASE WHEN NCSOL.SS_CODE ='QTC' THEN 'UO' WHEN NCSOL.SS_CODE ='BV' THEN 'BO'
  WHEN NCSOL.SS_CODE ='CG' THEN 'CG' END  CDB_DATA_SOURCE_CODE, 
  COALESCE(NSFATNHT.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,0) SPLIT_PERCENTAGE,
  CASE
  WHEN   NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE ='SERVICE' 
  THEN 'Y'
  ELSE       'N'
  END             DD_SERVICE_FLAG, 
  
  NSONHT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NSONHT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NSOLNHT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NCSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  NSOT.BK_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT                         BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
  NSOT.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM      PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER,
  NSOT.SO_SOURCE_CREATE_DTM        BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
  'R'                              FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE,
  COALESCE(NSOLNHT.BOOKINGS_PCT,100) BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE,
  COALESCE(NSOLNHT.UNIT_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,0)  NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
  CASE WHEN NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_CTGRY_TYPE_CD ='ORDER' THEN (-1 * COALESCE (NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_QUANTITY,0))
         ELSE COALESCE (NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_QUANTITY,0)  END TRANSACTION_QUANTITY, 
  NSONHT.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,
  NSONHT.SALES_ORDER_KEY SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  'N'             DD_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG,
  CASE
  WHEN   NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_CTGRY_TYPE_CD ='RETURN'
  THEN 'Y'
  ELSE       'N'
  END                                          DD_RMA_FLAG,
  CASE 
   WHEN CDB_DATA_SOURCE_CODE IN ('UO','BO')  THEN       
    CASE 
     WHEN SUBSTR(NSOT.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,1,8) ='Standard' THEN
      CASE 
       WHEN   NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD='Demo' THEN 'Y'
       WHEN   NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD= 'Evaluation' THEN 'Y' 
       WHEN   NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD= 'Int''l Demo' THEN 'Y'
       WHEN   NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD='Intl Demo' THEN 'Y'
      ELSE       'N'
      END
    ELSE       'N'
    END
  ELSE
    '=' 
  END                                                 DD_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLAG,
  
  CASE 
   WHEN CDB_DATA_SOURCE_CODE IN ('UO','BO')  THEN 
    CASE
     WHEN SUBSTR(NSOT.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,1,11) ='Replacement' THEN
      CASE
       WHEN   NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD='Demo' THEN 'Y'
       WHEN   NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD= 'Evaluation' THEN 'Y' 
       WHEN   NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD= 'Int''l Demo' THEN 'Y'
       WHEN   NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD='Intl Demo' THEN 'Y'
       ELSE       'N'
       END
    ELSE       'N'
    END 
  ELSE
    '=' 
  END              DD_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLAG,
  CASE
      WHEN   NSOTT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG IS NULL 
                  THEN 'N' 
                  ELSE       NSOTT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG
  END                           DD_REVENUE_FLAG,
  CASE
  WHEN   NST.BK_SALES_HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE  IS NULL
  THEN 'Y'
  ELSE       'N'
  END                                                 DD_OVERLAY_FLAG,
  CASE
  WHEN   NSFATNHT.SALES_REP_NUMBER IS NULL          
  THEN 'Y'
  ELSE       'N'
  END                                                 DD_SALESREP_FLAG,
  CASE
  WHEN   NCAT_IC.INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_FLAG= 'I' 
  THEN 'N'
  WHEN   NCAT_IC.INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_FLAG IS NULL 
  THEN 'N'
  ELSE       'Y'
  END                  DD_IC_REVENUE_FLAG,
  CASE
  WHEN   NP.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID= 'CHARGES' 
  THEN 'Y'
  ELSE       'N'
  END                                                 DD_CHARGES_FLAG,  
  CASE
  WHEN   SUBSTR(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,1,4)= 'MISC' 
  THEN 'Y'
  ELSE       'N'
  END                                                 DD_MISC_FLAG,
  CASE
  WHEN   NSOT.SALES_ORDER_SOURCE_TYPE_CD ='EC ACQUISITION' 
  THEN 'Y'
  WHEN   NSOT.SALES_ORDER_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'ACQUISITION CONVERSION' 
  THEN 'Y'
  WHEN   NSOT.SALES_ORDER_SOURCE_TYPE_CD ='BACKLOG CONVERSION' 
  THEN 'Y'
  ELSE       'N'
  END                                          DD_ACQUISITION_FLAG,
  NSFATNHT.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT ES_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
  COALESCE(NSOT.CANCELLED_FLG,'N')                    CANCELLED_FLG,
  NSOT.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM          RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,
  NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_CTGRY_TYPE_CD       SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE, /* modified from nost to nsol */
  NSOLNHT.SS_CD SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE,
  NSOT.SO_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD       SALES_ORDER_OPERATING_UNIT,
  COALESCE(NSOLNHT.PRODUCT_KEY,-999) PRODUCT_KEY,
  COALESCE(NSFATNHT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999) SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  COALESCE(NSFATNHT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,'UNKNOWN') SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
  NSOT.CUSTOMER_PO_TYPE_CD                  CUSTOMER_PO_TYPE_CD   ,
  NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD                 SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,
  NSOT.SALES_ORDER_SOURCE_TYPE_CD           BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME,   
  NSOL.DV_PRICING_DT                        PRICING_DATE,
  NSOL.SO_LINE_SOURCE_CREATE_DTM            LINE_CREATION_DATE,
  NSOL.UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT            UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
  NSOL.SO_LINE_TYPE_NAME                    SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
  NSOLNHT.EP_CHANGED_QUANTITY               EP_CHANGED_QUANTITY,
  USER                                      EDW_CREATE_USER,                                    
  USER                                      EDW_UPDATE_USER,                                    
  
  
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                      EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,                           
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                      EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
  NSOT.ORDER_DTM          ORDER_DTM,
  CAST(NSONHT.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM AS DATE) SO_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,
  CAST(NSOLNHT.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM AS DATE) SOL_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,
  CAST(NSFATNHT.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM AS DATE) SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,
  NSFATNHT.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY,
  WLID.EP_PROCESS_DT,
  /* Replaced SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY with TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY as part of  OA - Q3FY15 */
CASE  WHEN ( WSOA.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL OR WSOA_MPOB.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL)THEN 'BUNDLE' 
                    ELSE 'STANDALONE' END AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD, /* Changed as part of NRS MPOB Changes */
  CAST(-9999 AS INT) AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT  ,   
  NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,  
  COALESCE(NSOLNHT.PRODUCT_KEY,-999) AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY, 
  NCSOL.BK_SO_LINE_CANCEL_REASON_CD ,
  NCSOL.SOL_CANCEL_REASON_CODE CANCEL_CODE,
  CAST (100 AS DECIMAL(18,8)) AS ATTRIBUTION_PCT /*Added ATTRIBUTION_PCT as part of Q1FY15 -Offer Attribution for Base list price changes*/ 
  ,WSOA_MPOB.POB_TYPE_CD /* Added as part of NRS MPOB Changes */
   ,NSOLNHT.SALES_MOTION_CD /* Added as part of Sales OCTFY18Rel Changes*/
   ,WSOA_NOAH.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
   /*ADDED AS PART OF SFP Q4FY21 REL*/
   ,COALESCE(NSOLNHT.UNIT_WHLSL_PRC_LST_LOC_AMT,0.0000000) AS UNIT_WHLSL_PRC_LST_LOC_AMT
  FROM
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CANCELLED_SOL NCSOL 
 INNER JOIN (SELECT * 
 FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NRT_HIST_TV 
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
   CAST(SO_LINE_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM AS DATE) 
 ORDER BY SO_LINE_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM DESC) =1 ) NSOLNHT
 ON NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NCSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
 AND  CAST(NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_DATETIME AS DATE ) = CAST(NSOLNHT.SO_LINE_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM  AS DATE)  
 INNER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_ALL_TRX_NRT_HIST_TV NSFATNHT
 ON  NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSFATNHT.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND NSFATNHT.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 AND NSFATNHT.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD='O'
 INNER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_NRT_HIST_TV NSONHT
 ON  NSONHT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_KEY
 AND NSONHT.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 AND NSONHT.CISCO_BOOKED_RESULT_CD = 'Y'
 INNER JOIN $$NRTSTGDB.WI_LINES_INCR_DEBOOKINGS WLID 
 ON NCSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = WLID.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_DATETIME = WLID.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY NST
 ON (NSFATNHT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = NST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AND NST.BK_SALES_HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE  lIKE 'CORP%.%REVENUE')
 LEFT OUTER JOIN ( 
     $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCAT_IC
     LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_PARTY NPT
                  ON( NCAT_IC.ERP_CUSTOMER_NUMBER= NPT.ERP_PARTY_NUMBER AND NPT.ERP_PARTY_NAME NOT LIKE '%REGRESSION%TEST%' )
     )                
     ON NSONHT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY=NCAT_IC.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY                     
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NRT NSOL
                 ON(NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY= NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_NRT NSOT
                 ON( NSONHT.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE  NSOTT                  
     /*ON( NSOT.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME=NSOTT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)*/
   ON( NSOL.SO_LINE_TYPE_NAME=NSOTT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
 INNER  JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
                 ON(NSOLNHT.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY) 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ITEM_CLASS  FND
 ON NP.BK_ITEM_CLASS_CODE = FND.BK_ITEM_CLASS_CODE
 AND FND.ITEM_CLASS_NAME  <> 'Option class'
 
 LEFT JOIN (SELECT TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_TV WHERE CISCO_BOOKED_ATTRIBUTION_FLG='Y' 
 AND END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' GROUP BY 1) WSOA /* sanpatra :ADDED THIS JOIN as part of OFFER ATTRIBUTION */
 ON WSOA.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY      /*OA - Q3FY15 */
  
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,POB_TYPE_CD FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_TV WHERE CISCO_BOOKED_ATTRIBUTION_FLG='Y' 
 AND END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
 AND ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'OFFSET' AND POB_TYPE_CD = 'MPOB'  GROUP BY 1,2) WSOA_MPOB 
 ON WSOA_MPOB.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY      /*NRS PI2 Change*/
 
LEFT JOIN (SELECT TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,BUNDLE_TYPE_CD FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_TV WHERE CISCO_BOOKED_ATTRIBUTION_FLG='Y'
AND END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'OFFSET' AND BUNDLE_TYPE_CD IN ('NOAH') GROUP BY 1,2) WSOA_NOAH
ON WSOA_NOAH.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY    /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
 
 /*WHERE COALESCE(NSOL.BOOKINGS_SOURCE_CD,'UNK') <> 'SBP' /*Q4FY15 XAAS*/
 WHERE COALESCE(NSOL.BOOKINGS_SOURCE_CD,'UNK') NOT IN ('TSL',  'SBP') /*Q4FY16 FCM XAAS*/
 
 UNION ALL  /* Added the new flow for Offer Attribution data */
  			  

  SELECT  
  CASE
  WHEN   NSOT.ORDER_DTM IS NULL 
  THEN CAST(NSOT.SO_SOURCE_CREATE_DTM AS DATE)
  ELSE       CAST(NSOT.ORDER_DTM AS DATE)
  END             CONVERSION_DT,
  COALESCE(NSFATNHT.SALES_REP_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') SALES_REP_NUMBER,
  NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_DATETIME TRANSACTION_DATETIME,
  COALESCE(NSONHT.SALES_CHANNEL_CD,'UNKNOWN') SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
  CASE WHEN NCSOL.SS_CODE ='QTC' THEN 'UO' WHEN NCSOL.SS_CODE ='BV' THEN 'BO'
  WHEN NCSOL.SS_CODE ='CG' THEN 'CG' END  CDB_DATA_SOURCE_CODE, 
  COALESCE(NSFATNHT.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,0) SPLIT_PERCENTAGE,
  CASE
  WHEN   NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE ='SERVICE' 
  THEN 'Y'
  ELSE       'N'
  END             DD_SERVICE_FLAG, 
  
  NSONHT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NSONHT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NSOLNHT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  WSOA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  AS   SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, /*Q3FY15 populate Attributed SOL KEY instead of -9999 for Offset and Attributed */
  NSOT.BK_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT                         BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
  NSOT.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM      PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER,
  NSOT.SO_SOURCE_CREATE_DTM        BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
  'R'                          FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE,
  COALESCE(WSOA.BOOKINGS_PCT,100) BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE,
  COALESCE (WSOA.UNIT_SELLING_PRC_TRX_AMT,0)  AS NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
  /*CASE WHEN NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_CTGRY_TYPE_CD ='RETURN' THEN (-1 * COALESCE (NSOLNHT.EP_CHANGED_QUANTITY,0))
         ELSE COALESCE (NSOLNHT.EP_CHANGED_QUANTITY,0)  END TRANSACTION_QUANTITY, */
  /* Modified the derivation of transaction quantity - Q4FY14 Offer Attribution*/
  CASE WHEN WSOA.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN( 'OFFSET') THEN 
           (CASE WHEN NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_CTGRY_TYPE_CD ='ORDER' THEN (-1 * COALESCE (NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_QUANTITY,0)) * (-1)
               ELSE COALESCE (NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_QUANTITY,0) * (-1) END) 
  ELSE        (CASE WHEN NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_CTGRY_TYPE_CD ='ORDER' THEN (-1 * COALESCE (NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_QUANTITY,0))
               ELSE COALESCE (NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_QUANTITY,0)  END)
  END TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
  NSONHT.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,
  NSONHT.SALES_ORDER_KEY SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  'N'             DD_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG,
  CASE
  WHEN   NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_CTGRY_TYPE_CD ='RETURN'
  THEN 'Y'
  ELSE       'N'
  END                                          DD_RMA_FLAG,
  CASE 
   WHEN CDB_DATA_SOURCE_CODE IN ('UO','BO')  THEN       
    CASE 
     WHEN SUBSTR(NSOT.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,1,8) ='Standard' THEN
      CASE 
       WHEN   NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD='Demo' THEN 'Y'
       WHEN   NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD= 'Evaluation' THEN 'Y' 
       WHEN   NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD= 'Int''l Demo' THEN 'Y'
       WHEN   NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD='Intl Demo' THEN 'Y'
      ELSE       'N'
      END
    ELSE       'N'
    END
  ELSE
    '=' 
  END                                                 DD_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLAG,
  
  CASE 
   WHEN CDB_DATA_SOURCE_CODE IN ('UO','BO')  THEN 
    CASE
     WHEN SUBSTR(NSOT.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,1,11) ='Replacement' THEN
      CASE
       WHEN   NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD='Demo' THEN 'Y'
       WHEN   NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD= 'Evaluation' THEN 'Y' 
       WHEN   NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD= 'Int''l Demo' THEN 'Y'
       WHEN   NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD='Intl Demo' THEN 'Y'
       ELSE       'N'
       END
    ELSE       'N'
    END 
  ELSE
    '=' 
  END              DD_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLAG,
  CASE
      WHEN   NSOTT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG IS NULL 
                  THEN 'N' 
                  ELSE       NSOTT.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG
  END                           DD_REVENUE_FLAG,
  CASE
  WHEN   NST.BK_SALES_HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE  IS NULL
  THEN 'Y'
  ELSE       'N'
  END                                                 DD_OVERLAY_FLAG,
  CASE
  WHEN   NSFATNHT.SALES_REP_NUMBER IS NULL          
  THEN 'Y'
  ELSE       'N'
  END                                                 DD_SALESREP_FLAG,
  CASE
  WHEN   NCAT_IC.INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_FLAG= 'I' 
  THEN 'N'
  WHEN   NCAT_IC.INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_FLAG IS NULL 
  THEN 'N'
  ELSE       'Y'
  END                  DD_IC_REVENUE_FLAG,
  CASE
  WHEN   NP.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID= 'CHARGES' 
  THEN 'Y'
  ELSE       'N'
  END                                                 DD_CHARGES_FLAG,  
  CASE
  WHEN   SUBSTR(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,1,4)= 'MISC' 
  THEN 'Y'
  ELSE       'N'
  END                                                 DD_MISC_FLAG,
  CASE
  WHEN   NSOT.SALES_ORDER_SOURCE_TYPE_CD ='EC ACQUISITION' 
  THEN 'Y'
  WHEN   NSOT.SALES_ORDER_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'ACQUISITION CONVERSION' 
  THEN 'Y'
  WHEN   NSOT.SALES_ORDER_SOURCE_TYPE_CD ='BACKLOG CONVERSION' 
  THEN 'Y'
  ELSE       'N'
  END                                          DD_ACQUISITION_FLAG,
  NSFATNHT.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT ES_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
  COALESCE(NSOT.CANCELLED_FLG,'N')                    CANCELLED_FLG,
  NSOT.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM          RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,
  NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_CTGRY_TYPE_CD       SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE, /* modified from nost to nsol */
  NSOLNHT.SS_CD SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE,
  NSOT.SO_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD       SALES_ORDER_OPERATING_UNIT,
  COALESCE(WSOA.PRODUCT_KEY,-999) PRODUCT_KEY,
  COALESCE(NSFATNHT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999) SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  COALESCE(NSFATNHT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,'UNKNOWN') SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
  NSOT.CUSTOMER_PO_TYPE_CD                            CUSTOMER_PO_TYPE_CD   ,
  NSOT.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD           SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,
  NSOT.SALES_ORDER_SOURCE_TYPE_CD         BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME,   
  NSOL.DV_PRICING_DT                                  PRICING_DATE,
  NSOL.SO_LINE_SOURCE_CREATE_DTM                      LINE_CREATION_DATE,
  ((COALESCE(NSOL.UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,0)  * COALESCE(WSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,0))/100.00000000) UNIT_LIST_PRICE,        
  NSOL.SO_LINE_TYPE_NAME                              SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
  NSOLNHT.EP_CHANGED_QUANTITY                         EP_CHANGED_QUANTITY,
  USER                                                EDW_CREATE_USER,                                    
  USER                                                EDW_UPDATE_USER,                                    
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                                EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,                           
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                                EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
  NSOT.ORDER_DTM          ORDER_DTM,
  CAST(NSONHT.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM AS DATE) SO_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,
  CAST(NSOLNHT.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM AS DATE) SOL_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,
  CAST(NSFATNHT.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM AS DATE) SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,
  NSFATNHT.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY,
  WLID.EP_PROCESS_DT,
  WSOA.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD       ,          
  WSOA.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT  ,       
  WSOA.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, /* Q3FY15 use WSOA for clarity */ 
  COALESCE(NSOLNHT.PRODUCT_KEY,-999) DV_PRODUCT_KEY, 
  NCSOL.BK_SO_LINE_CANCEL_REASON_CD,
  NCSOL.SOL_CANCEL_REASON_CODE CANCEL_CODE,
  WSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT AS ATTRIBUTION_PCT /*Added ATTRIBUTION_PCT as part of Q1FY15 -Offer Attribution for Base list price changes*/ 
  ,WSOA.POB_TYPE_CD /* Added as part of NRS MPOB Changes */
    ,NSOLNHT.SALES_MOTION_CD /*Added as part of Sales OCTFY18Rel Changes*/
	,WSOA.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
	/*ADDED AS PART OF SFP Q4FY21 REL*/
	,CAST( ( COALESCE(NSOLNHT.UNIT_WHLSL_PRC_LST_LOC_AMT,0.0000000) * (COALESCE(WSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,100)/100) ) AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) AS UNIT_WHLSL_PRC_LST_LOC_AMT
  FROM
  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CANCELLED_SOL NCSOL 
  INNER JOIN (SELECT * 
  FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NRT_HIST_TV 
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
    CAST(SO_LINE_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM AS DATE)
  ORDER BY SO_LINE_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM DESC) =1 ) NSOLNHT
  ON NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NCSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
  AND  CAST(NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_DATETIME AS DATE ) = CAST(NSOLNHT.SO_LINE_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM  AS DATE) 
  INNER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_ALL_TRX_NRT_HIST_TV NSFATNHT
  ON  NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSFATNHT.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  AND NSFATNHT.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
  AND NSFATNHT.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD='O'
  INNER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_NRT_HIST_TV NSONHT
  ON  NSONHT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_KEY
  AND NSONHT.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
  AND NSONHT.CISCO_BOOKED_RESULT_CD = 'Y'
  INNER JOIN $$NRTSTGDB.WI_LINES_INCR_DEBOOKINGS WLID 
  ON NCSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = WLID.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  AND NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_DATETIME= WLID.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM
  INNER JOIN $$NRTSTGDB.WI_SOL_OFER_ATR_INC_DEBOOKINGS  WSOA /* Moved up the join Q4FY14 OA BKGS */
  ON  WLID.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=WSOA.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY      /* OA - Q3FY15  use TOP SKU SOL */
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY NST
  ON (NSFATNHT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = NST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AND NST.BK_SALES_HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE  lIKE 'CORP%.%REVENUE')
  LEFT OUTER JOIN ( 
      $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCAT_IC
      LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_PARTY NPT
                   ON( NCAT_IC.ERP_CUSTOMER_NUMBER= NPT.ERP_PARTY_NUMBER AND NPT.ERP_PARTY_NAME NOT LIKE '%REGRESSION%TEST%' )
      )                
      ON NSONHT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY=NCAT_IC.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY                     
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NRT NSOL
                  ON(NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY= NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY )
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_NRT NSOT
                  ON( NSONHT.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE  NSOTT                  
      /*ON( NSOT.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME=NSOTT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)*/
    ON( NSOL.SO_LINE_TYPE_NAME=NSOTT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
  INNER  JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
  ON(WSOA.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY) /* Using PRODUCT_KEY from Offer attribution WI - Q4FY14 OA*/
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ITEM_CLASS  FND
  ON NP.BK_ITEM_CLASS_CODE = FND.BK_ITEM_CLASS_CODE
  AND FND.ITEM_CLASS_NAME  <> 'Option class'
  /*WHERE COALESCE(NSOL.BOOKINGS_SOURCE_CD,'UNK') <> 'SBP' /*Q4FY15 XAAS*/
  WHERE COALESCE(NSOL.BOOKINGS_SOURCE_CD,'UNK') NOT IN ('TSL',  'SBP') /*Q4FY16 FCM XAAS*/
    )TMP1, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT),0)  MAX_VAL FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_BKG_TRX_NRT) TMP2

SELECT
RANK() OVER (ORDER BY WIMDNBT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT)+ SMDNBTKR_MAX.MAX_DRVD_BKG_VAL DRVD_NCR_BKG_TRX_KEY,
WIMDNBT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT,
USER  EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM 
FROM
(
SELECT 
WDNDT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT
FROM 
$$NRTSTGDB.WI_DRVD_NRT_DEBOOKINGS_TRX WDNDT 
)WIMDNBT,
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(DRVD_NCR_BKG_TRX_KEY),0) MAX_DRVD_BKG_VAL FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_BKG_TRX_NRT)SMDNBTKR_MAX
WHERE
NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_BKG_TRX_NRT SMDNBTKR WHERE SMDNBTKR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT = WIMDNBT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT)

SELECT NCSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_DATETIME AS SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM       , CAST(NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_DATETIME AS DATE)EP_PROCESS_DT,NCSOL.SS_CODE SS_CD FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CANCELLED_SOL NCSOL,
$$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_NRT NSO
WHERE NCSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY AND NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_DATETIME >= NSO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
AND NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_DATETIME > (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_WI_DRVD_NRT_DEBOOKINGS_TRX')
AND CAST(NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_DATETIME AS DATE) <= (SELECT PROCESS_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL) AND NCSOL.SS_CODE='QTC'

UNION ALL 

SELECT NCSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_DATETIME AS SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM       , CAST(NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_DATETIME AS DATE)EP_PROCESS_DT,NCSOL.SS_CODE SS_CD FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CANCELLED_SOL NCSOL,
$$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_NRT NSO
WHERE NCSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY AND NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_DATETIME >= NSO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
AND NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_DATETIME > (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_W_DRVD_NRT_DEBOOKINGS_TRX')
AND CAST(NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_DATETIME AS DATE) <= (SELECT PROCESS_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL) AND NCSOL.SS_CODE='BV'

UNION ALL

SELECT NCSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_DATETIME AS SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM       , CAST(NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_DATETIME AS DATE)EP_PROCESS_DT,NCSOL.SS_CODE SS_CD FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CANCELLED_SOL NCSOL,
$$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_NRT NSO
WHERE NCSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY AND NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_DATETIME >= NSO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM
AND NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_DATETIME > (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_MT_DRVD_NRT_DEBOOKINGS_TRX')
AND CAST(NCSOL.SOL_CANCELLED_DATETIME AS DATE) <= (SELECT PROCESS_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL) AND NCSOL.SS_CODE='CG'
